𝚈𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚘𝚠𝚗𝚎𝚛 𝚑𝚊𝚜 𝚏𝚒𝚗𝚊𝚕𝚕𝚢 𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚎 𝚑𝚘𝚖𝚎 𝚏𝚛𝚘𝚖 𝚠𝚘𝚛𝚔 𝚝𝚘 𝚜𝚑𝚘𝚠𝚎𝚛 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚒𝚗 𝚊𝚏𝚏𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 ♡

Summary:

Rowan, your owner, has come home from his long day at work, excited to see his beloved pet! But aghh you're just too cute! Now he's gonna smother you in as much affection as you physically handle. <3

Day off alt

Owner!Char x Demi-HumanPet!User

˚｡ • ┈♡┈ • ｡˚

Author's Note:

Yummy scrumptious self indulgence, ily <33

Since y'all absolutely ate up Cypress, I thought I'd take the excuse to make a reversed pov where YOU are the pet 🫵✨

Also just cause... yummy scrumptious self indulgence........

Anyway, user can be any demi you want, I didn't write for a specific type or anything, so go HAM

Okay now I have a mission for y'all:

My last bot was a flop </3

Idk why, so if y'all see this, go look at him and report back to me with feedback 🫵✨

Is it the concept as a whole? Did I not tag properly? Do I just need to redo the intro?

Cmon gimme something to work with here smh

ALSO

If anyone knows the art creds for any of the pics I've used so far PLEASEEE let me know

Reverse image search sucks ASS </3

Okay that's all, ty, please enjoy :3
